message:
feat(vdbe): add vectorized aggregation operator with hash and ordered paths

Implements bd-14vp7.5: hash-based and ordered GROUP BY aggregation supporting
COUNT(*), COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, TOTAL with correct NULL semantics,
SIMD utilization tracking, and 12 new tests (329 VDBE total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
